scripts.dev: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:init && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @competition-manager/server" "npm run dev --workspace @competition-manager/web"
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace @competition-manager/shared && npm run build --workspace @competition-manager/server && npm run build --workspace @competition-manager/web
scripts.start: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:init && npm run start --workspace @competition-manager/server
